Notice Of Stipulated Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Entry Of Default As To Plaintiffs' Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PARAMOUNT UTILITY CORPORATION's Stipulated Motion To Set Aside Default And Entry Of Default As To Plaintiffs' Complaint.

Defendant Paramount Utility Corporation's stipulated motion to set aside default and entry of default is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
